meaning: n.透视画法,透视图,远景,前途,观点,看法,观点,观察
examples: In his art he broke the laws of scientific linear perspective.
I let things get out of perspective.
The tree on the left is out of perspective.
We can also give you some perspective that will help you invest for the long term.
Forbes.com: How does the world look from the perspective of a heavy duty truck maker?
